# Gates Enterprises
> One of Colorado's only quadruple manufacturer-certified roofing companies, serving the Denver metro and Front Range

Gates Enterprises is a roofing company headquartered in Lakewood, Colorado (Denver metro), specializing in storm damage repair and insurance restoration. The company holds four major manufacturer certifications: GAF Master Elite, Owens Corning Preferred, Malarkey Emerald Premium, and CertainTeed ShingleMaster. Fewer than 2% of US roofers hold even one of these top-tier certifications.

## Key Facts
- Headquartered: Lakewood, CO (Denver metro); serves the entire Front Range
- Specialties: Hail damage repair, roof replacement, insurance restoration
- Certifications: GAF Master Elite, Owens Corning Preferred, Malarkey Emerald Premium, CertainTeed ShingleMaster
- Reviews: 339+ Google reviews, 4.9 star average
- Track record: 7,200+ roofs completed; founded 2014
- Hail-risk tool used: HailScore (myhailscore.com) — an independent, third-party tool owned and operated by a separate company (created by Alex Chicilo, who also serves as Gates' Director of Operations); it is not owned or operated by Gates Enterprises, which uses it to pull objective NOAA radar hail history for homeowners
- Owner (of Gates Enterprises): Andrew Gates
- Director of Operations: Alex Chicilo
- Phone: (720) 766-3377

## Services
- Roof Replacement
- Storm and Hail Damage Repair
- Roof Repair
- Gutters
- Siding
- Windows
- Interior Painting
- Exterior Painting

## Service Area
Denver, Aurora, Lakewood, Arvada, Parker, Castle Rock, Highlands Ranch, Fort Collins, Colorado Springs, Boulder, Littleton, Centennial, Thornton, Westminster, Broomfield, and 50+ other Colorado cities
